seed_instruction: Write a professional email that you could send to ask your boss for a raise.
org_constraint: The email must contain exactly five sentences.
new_constraint: The email must contain at least two paragraphs, with each consisting of at least three sentences.
instruction: Write a professional email that you could send to ask your boss for a raise. The email must contain exactly five sentences. The email must contain at least two paragraphs, with each consisting of at least three sentences.
response:
Subject: Discussion Regarding Compensation and Performance Review

I would like to request a meeting to discuss my current role and compensation. Over the past year, I have consistently exceeded my performance targets and taken on additional responsibilities. I am very proud of the contributions I have made to the team's success.

I believe my dedication and results justify a salary increase at this time. I would appreciate the opportunity to review my achievements with you in person. Please let me know when you might have some time available this week.<turn|>
